summary: PQ is overwhelming favorite to win Chicoutimi by-election Feb 23, 2026. 338Canada projects PQ at 47% with >99% win probability. PQ has won 3 straight by-elections.
content:
Key findings:
1. 338Canada projects PQ at 47% ± 8% in Chicoutimi, with >99% win probability (as of Feb 3, 2026)
2. The riding is rated "Safe PQ" by 338Canada
3. QC125 had the riding as "solid PQ" or "Pivot PQ/CAQ" 
4. PQ has won the last 3 Quebec by-elections: Jean-Talon (Oct 2023), Terrebonne (Mar 2025), Arthabaska (Aug 2025)
5. Chicoutimi was a PQ stronghold before CAQ took it in 2018
6. CAQ support has collapsed from 41% (2022) to ~11-17% provincially
7. Provincial polls: PQ 32-35%, PLQ 20-26%, CAQ 11-17%, PCQ 14-16%, QS 7-11%
8. Montreal Gazette: "The Parti Québécois is expected to be a heavy favourite"
9. PQ candidate: Marie-Karlynn Laflamme (UQAC VP) - strong local profile
10. CAQ candidate: Francis Tremblay (CIUSSS employee/master's student) - weaker profile
11. CPQ projected 2nd at 19% in riding (conservative strength in region)
12. Legault resigned as leader, CAQ in disarray - 2026 leadership election underway
